views.name: DashboardView
views.purpose: Main dashboard showing today's habit completion ring with count inside, current streak with flame icon, stat grid (today completed, weekly rate, longest streak, avg duration), and a quick-glance weekly bar chart of daily completion counts

views.name: EntrySheet
views.purpose: Quick habit check-in modal with habit name field (with autocomplete from recent habits), category picker, completion toggle, optional duration stepper, difficulty slider 1-5, time-of-day picker, and optional notes

views.name: HistoryView
views.purpose: Calendar heatmap at top showing completion density per day (darker green = more habits done), filter chips by habit name and category, date-grouped entry list with completion badges and duration labels

views.name: AnalyticsView
views.purpose: Deep analytics with per-habit consistency bar chart (sorted by completion rate), category breakdown donut chart, weekday completion pattern heatmap, streak timeline showing streak start/end history, trend arrows comparing this week vs last, and AI-generated insight cards

viewModelComputedProperties.name: todayCompletedHabits
viewModelComputedProperties.description: All entries marked completed for today, used to render today's checklist state

viewModelComputedProperties.name: todayCompletionCount
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Count of distinct habit names completed today

viewModelComputedProperties.name: dailyGoalProgress
viewModelComputedProperties.description: todayCompletionCount / dailyHabitGoal clamped to 0.0-1.0 for the progress ring

viewModelComputedProperties.name: currentStreak
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Consecutive days ending today-or-yesterday where completed habit count >= dailyHabitGoal. Walks backward from most recent qualifying day.

viewModelComputedProperties.name: longestStreak
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Maximum streak ever recorded by scanning all entries chronologically

viewModelComputedProperties.name: weeklyCompletionRate
viewModelComputedProperties.description: This week's total completions divided by (uniqueHabitCount × daysElapsedThisWeek), as percentage 0-100

viewModelComputedProperties.name: previousWeekCompletionRate
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Same formula applied to prior Mon-Sun period for trend comparison

viewModelComputedProperties.name: trendDirection
viewModelComputedProperties.description: 'up' if weeklyCompletionRate exceeds previous by ≥5 points, 'down' if lower by ≥5, 'stable' otherwise

viewModelComputedProperties.name: weeklyCompletionData
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Last 7 days as (abbreviated day label, completion count) tuples for dashboard bar chart

viewModelComputedProperties.name: habitConsistencyRanking
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Each unique habit paired with its 30-day completion rate (days done / days since first tracked), sorted descending

viewModelComputedProperties.name: mostConsistentHabit
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Top habit from consistencyRanking, nil if no data

viewModelComputedProperties.name: leastConsistentHabit
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Bottom habit from consistencyRanking among those attempted ≥3 times

viewModelComputedProperties.name: categoryBreakdown
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Completed entries per HabitCategory over last 30 days for donut chart

viewModelComputedProperties.name: bestDayOfWeek
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Weekday name with highest average daily completion count across all history

viewModelComputedProperties.name: averageDailyDuration
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Mean of total durationMinutes per day over the last 7 days

viewModelComputedProperties.name: uniqueHabitCount
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Count of distinct habitName values across all entries

viewModelComputedProperties.name: monthlyHeatmapData
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Last 35 days as (date, completionCount) for the calendar heatmap visualization

viewModelComputedProperties.name: streakMilestone
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Non-nil motivational string when currentStreak hits 7, 14, 21, 30, 50, 100 days (e.g. '21 days — habit is forming!')

viewModelComputedProperties.name: recentHabitNames
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Unique habit names from last 30 days sorted by frequency descending, used for autocomplete suggestions in entry sheet

dailyGoal.description: Target number of distinct habits to complete each day. Drives the progress ring and streak calculation.

domainLogic.streakDefinition: A day qualifies for the streak if the user completed at least [dailyHabitGoal] distinct habits. The streak counts consecutive qualifying days walking backward from today (or yesterday if today has no entries yet). A single missed day breaks the streak.
domainLogic.trendAnalysis: Primary: compare current 7-day completion rate vs previous 7-day rate, surface as percentage change with direction arrow. Secondary: per-habit 30-day rolling rate — flag any habit whose rate dropped >20% in the last 7 days vs prior 7 as 'needs attention'. Tertiary: weekday analysis — compute average completions per day-of-week to surface strong/weak day patterns.
insights: Streak milestone celebrations at 7, 14, 21, 30, 50, 100 days with escalating motivational messages (e.g., '7 days: You're building momentum!', '21 days: Science says this is becoming automatic!')
Most and least consistent habit surfaced with specific completion rates and suggestion to adjust schedule for struggling habits
Day-of-week pattern insight (e.g., 'Mondays are your strongest day at 92% — Fridays drop to 45%, consider lighter Friday habits')
Weekly trend comparison showing exact percentage change with up/down/stable indicator
Category balance analysis — flag if >60% of completions are in one category ('Great fitness focus, but mindfulness needs love')
Time-of-day optimization — correlate timeSlot with completion rates to suggest best scheduling per habit
Duration trend — detect if average time per habit is declining (possible burnout signal) or increasing (deepening practice)
New habit celebration — recognize first 3 completions of any new habit name ('You started Meditation 3 days ago — keep it up!')
